title: dentaria glandulosa subsp. sibirica
intro: Dentaria glandulosa subsp. sibirica, also known as Siberian toothwort, is a plant species belonging to the family Brassicaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Siberian toothwort include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing, making it a popular herb in traditional medicine. Siberian toothwort is often prepared as a tincture or infusion for internal use, and it can also be applied topically as a compress or poultice for external treatments.
